task_updates.executor_notes: Added the discriminated `applyEdit` API in `useTimelineCommit`, rewired `useTimelineSave`, `useTimelineData`, `useTimelineState`, `TimelineEditor`, and every internal hook caller to use it, and removed the old row/config edit wrappers from the video-editor source. `createTrackAndMoveClip` still uses the `type: 'config'` path to preserve its existing no-overlap-resolution behavior. Verification passed with `cd /Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app && npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/` (21 files / 62 tests), `cd /Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app && npx tsc --noEmit`, and a targeted ESLint pass across the changed files.

task_updates.executor_notes: Simplified `useDerivedTimeline` by removing the signature-ref stabilization layer and deriving `resolvedConfig` directly from `data` with a `[data]`-scoped memo, which keeps the hook compliant with `react-hooks/exhaustive-deps`. Verification passed with the full video-editor Vitest module, `tsc --noEmit`, and targeted ESLint on the changed files; no automated regression surfaced that required reverting the simplification.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed. All video-editor callers now use `applyEdit`; `rg -n "applyTimelineEdit|applyResolvedConfigEdit" src/tools/video-editor` returns no remaining source usages. `createTrackAndMoveClip` still commits through the `type: 'config'` path in `useTimelineTrackManagement.ts`, so its existing no-overlap-resolution semantics are preserved, and the old wrappers were removed from the commit/data/context surfaces.

Confirmed. `useDerivedTimeline` now derives `resolvedConfig` with `useMemo(() => data?.resolvedConfig ?? null, [data])`, and the targeted ESLint pass on the changed files completed cleanly, so the `react-hooks/exhaustive-deps` rule is satisfied. The full video-editor suite and `tsc --noEmit` both passed after the simplification; no automated regression surfaced that required reverting the change.
